raw_consumer_statement: Citi closed my dispute for misrepresentation / services not as described even though the merchant never provided any written terms or agreement for the {$1900.00} charge. The merchant XXXX advertised their program as free and no credit card required, then after small initial payments on or around XX/XX/year> pressured me into a {$10000.00} payment that included undisclosed forfeiture terms if I didnt close a deal in 3 months. I never received any contract or terms. XXXX  already refunded {$2300.00} from this same merchant due to misrepresentation. Citi denied my dispute even though no contract or terms exist. I am requesting CFPB intervention to require Citi to re-open this dispute properly under Regulation Z for misrepresentation / services not as described.
